traits.name: Exalted Restoration
traits.description: If the deva dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The deva has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The deva makes two Holy Mace attacks.

actions.name: Holy Mace
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description: The deva casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell); 1/Day Each: Commune, Raise Dead

bonus_actions.name: Divine Aid (2/Day)
bonus_actions.description: The deva casts Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

tactical_info.environment: Mount Celestia, holy sites, divine missions
tactical_info.tactics: Focuses on protecting innocents, uses divine aid to heal allies, holy mace against fiends and undead
tactical_info.weaknesses: Good alignment limits aggressive options, vulnerable when protecting others
